name: Leonardo Nkuba
bio: I'm a Software Developer passionate about building practical digital solutions that solve real-world problems. I enjoy developing modern web applications, designing intuitive user experiences, and continuously expanding my knowledge of software engineering. Whether working independently or as part of a team, I strive to create reliable, scalable, and impactful software.

experience.description: Designed and delivered digital solutions for businesses, collaborating on websites, branding, and custom software while translating client needs into scalable technical solutions.
Developed and maintained full-stack systems, designed responsive user interfaces, optimized databases, and contributed to software that improved academic and administrative workflows.

projects.title: KixiPay
projects.description: Designed and built a social fintech platform that digitizes the kixikila (community savings group), giving members transparent contribution tracking, loan requests/approvals, and a trust-score system to reduce fraud and build a financial reputation.

projects.title: EvolvOut Website
projects.description: Designed and developed the company's website to showcase services, strengthen its online presence, and provide businesses with a modern digital experience.

projects.title: PEA Website
projects.description: Contributed to the development and improvement of the PEA web platform, creating responsive interfaces, implementing new features, and improving usability and overall system performance.
